features.name: port_output_wire_redeclared_as_wire
features.description: Code should include an output wire port declaration where the same signal name is redeclared as a wire inside the module body

features.name: port_output_reg_redeclared_as_reg
features.description: Code should include an output reg port declaration where the same signal name is redeclared as a reg inside the module body

features.name: wire_and_reg_redeclaration_in_same_module
features.description: Code should include both wire and reg signals that are declared as ports and then redeclared inside the module body with the same type
